ProjectImages.title: Read It For Me - Popup UI
Read It For Me - Floating Player

disclaimer: images used are from the product website - © All rights reserved

ProjectInfo.ObjectivesDetails: Developed a browser extension to provide natural text-to-speech functionality with smart language detection, premium voice selection, and accessibility features for users across Chrome, Edge, and Firefox.
ProjectInfo.Heading: Challenge
Details: Designed and implemented a cross-browser extension architecture supporting Chrome, Edge, and Firefox, with persistent settings and seamless user experience.
Built a React-based popup UI with collapsible settings, dark mode, and real-time voice preview, ensuring accessibility and keyboard navigation.
Engineered a robust content script for smart text selection, language detection, and integration with the Web Speech API for high-quality TTS.
Developed a floating player UI for playback controls, supporting drag, pause/resume, and keyboard shortcuts without interfering with page content.
Implemented a custom internationalization system supporting 7 languages, with dynamic locale switching and message management.
Ensured accessibility with ARIA attributes, semantic HTML, and screen reader support, following WCAG 2.1 AA guidelines.
Optimized performance with code splitting, efficient storage usage, and minimal content script footprint.
Maintained high code quality with TypeScript strict mode, modular components, and comprehensive error handling.
